title: Invitation Homes Announces Pricing of $450 Million of 5.450% Senior Notes due 2030 and $350 Million of 5.500% Senior Notes due 2033
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Invitation Homes Inc. (NYSE: INVH) (“Invitation Homes” or the “Company”) announced today that its operating partnership, Invitation Homes Operating Partnership LP (the “Operating Partnership”), has priced a public offering of $450 million aggregate principal amount of 5.450% Senior Notes due 2030 (the “2030 Notes”) and $350 million aggregate principal amount of 5.500% Senior Notes due 2033 (the “2033 Notes” and, together with the 2030 Notes, the “Notes”). The 2030 Notes.

title: Invitation Home (INVH) Lags Q2 FFO Estimates
text: Invitation Home (INVH) came out with quarterly funds from operations (FFO) of $0.44 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.45 per share. This compares to FFO of $0.42 per share a year ago.

title: Invitation Homes Reports Second Quarter 2023 Results
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Invitation Homes Inc. (NYSE: INVH) ("Invitation Homes" or the "Company"), the nation's premier single-family home leasing company, today announced its Q2 2023 financial and operating results, along with an increase to the Company's 2023 full year guidance. In addition, Invitation Homes also announced today that on July 18, 2023, the Company acquired a premier portfolio of nearly 1,900 homes for approximately $650 million. title: Invitation Homes Announces Cash Dividend
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Invitation Homes Inc. (NYSE: INVH) (“Invitation Homes” or the “Company”) announced today that it has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.26 per share payable on shares of its common stock. The dividend will be paid on or before August 25, 2023, to stockholders of record of the Company's common stock as of the close of business on August 8, 2023. title: Invitation Homes and Esusu to Provide Free Positive Credit Reporting For Nearly 200,000 Invitation Homes Residents
text: DALLAS & HARLEM, N.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Invitation Homes Inc.
